wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: At Belmont Village Hunters Creek, we provide a multitude of community features. Residents can participate in regular off-site adventures and excursions. Animals such as dogs and cats are allowed in private quarters. Our property is conveniently located near reachable public transportation. We have free wi-fi and high speed internet. Our location conveniently offers resident parking and guest parking. Our purpose-built community offers the advantage of individualized care; every aspect of the community is designed to cater to the individual needs of its residents.
Private Patio, Deck, or Balcony
Low / No Sodium or Sugar
Private Lanai, Patio, or Balcony
Low / No Sodium or Sugar

Ilima is located within the 40 acre Leihano mixed-use community in the heart of the new 'Second City' of Oahu. Ilima offers Independent Living, Assisted Living and Memory Care embracing both, indoor and outdoor living with an innovative approach to living well.
Within and adjacent to Leihano, you will find shopping, medical services, the Kapolei public library, regional transit hub, and the 60 acre Kapolei Regional Park. All of these amenities and services are connected by existing and planned pedestrian greenways with no hills to climb or major roads to cross. These are the benefits of living in the City of Kapolei — Hawaii's first true pedestrian-oriented, master-planned community.
*Rooms are unfurnished.
Private Lanai, Patio, or Balcony
Low / No Sodium or Sugar

Nestled in the lush Ka'alakei Valley, Hawaii Kai is a welcoming haven. Stroll the walking paths and enjoy serene sites of blooming flowers and bubbling waterfalls. Cool off in the saltwater pool. Dine on culturally inspired chef-prepared meals and take in ocean views from the dining room. Enjoy meaningful relationships with neighbors and staff, and a strong connection with the surrounding community. You're close to shopping centers, healthcare, many unique local attractions, and just 20 minutes from downtown Honolulu and Waikiki.

Hawaii Kai is feeling more like family than ever with new leadership at the helm of caring staff, many who've been serving our residents for decades. With a renewed sense of ‘Ohana and ongoing upgrades to our beautiful grounds, we're your award-winning choice for senior living in Honolulu.
Private Lanai, Patio, or Balcony

Skilled Nursing Facility opened its doors on June 5th, 2012. As a small community of only 27 residents, we are able to focus on individualized needs. At Manoa Cottage Kaimuki, we dedicate specialized activities and programs to address the behaviors associated with Alzheimer’s and dementia. Most importantly, we strive to maintain independence, individuality, and a sense of purpose. We Offer
  • Skilled Nursing, Intermediate, Long-Term Respite, and Hospice Care
  • Private Bedrooms
  • Semi-private Bedrooms (2 beds with private entrance for each resident)
  • Shared Bedrooms (3-bed rooms)
  • Memory Support
  • Social Programming
  • Local-Style Homemade Meals
  • Activities & Events
Rates Include
  • Room & Board
  • 24-Hour Licensed Nursing Staff
  • 24-Hour Security & Supervision
  • Medication Administration
  • Meals & Snacks
  • Daily Care Supplies
  • Access to a full range of rehabilitation specialists, palliative care specialists, and hospice services is available on site.
Memory Care Programs
Namaste Care “Namaste” means “to honor the spirit within”. This program, developed by Joyce Simard, provides meaningful activities through a “loving touch” approach. A peaceful environment is created to preserve dignity and tranquility, even as a resident’s verbal and cognitive abilities decline.
Music & Memory Manoa Cottage Kaimuki was the first private facility in Hawaii to be certified in “Music and Memory” – a national program that brings music into the lives of the elderly. Each resident receives an iPod Shuffle with a personalized playlist. This allows those struggling with Alzheimer’s and Dementia to reconnect with the world through music-triggered memories.
Resident Safety
  • Wander Prevention System
  • Nurse Call System
  • Monitoring devices
    • Floor Mats, Clip Alarms. Pressure Sensors
  • Supervised Activities
    • Scheduled during waking hours and as needed
  • Video Surveillance
Activities
  • Games & Crafts
  • Special Events & Onsite Performances
  • Cooking & Baking
  • Gardening & Flower Arranging
  • Exercise
Low / No Sodium or Sugar

Welcome to Hale O Meleana
Hale O Meleana is the newest addition to St. Francis Healthcare Systems of Hawaii; one of the largest providers of multifaceted care options for seniors and family caregivers in the islands. At Hale O Meleana, we do more than provide help with everyday tasks. Our kind and compassionate senior care professionals in Honolulu, HI, offer round-the-clock support and tailored encouragement that allows each resident to embrace their independence and pursue a truly rich and fulfilling lifestyle. Moments shared between residents and with staff help create the family-style atmosphere that makes our community such a warm and welcoming place to call home. And to keep you as active as you want to be, we offer a full menu of daily activities and special events, from daily morning exercise and coffee chats to off-site excursions and more!
Whether you can beneﬁt from supportive living on a full-time basis or for just a few hours a day or week, we invite you experience Hale O' Meleana.
Offering assisted living and an adult day program, Hale O Meleana is part of the St. Francis Kupuna Village in Liliha, a unique one-stop health and wellness campus designed to meet the growing and changing needs of Honolulu’s rapidly expanding senior population – and their caregivers.
With a backdrop that features an abundance of natural beauty, Hale O Meleana residents can enjoy a community and campus that features walking paths and themed gardens to encourage residents to stay active and engaged. With beautiful tropical views, a robust activities calendar, 24-hour support and access to high-quality medical care, skilled nursing and rehabilitative services, Hale O Meleana is the perfect place to live a rich and fulfilling life.
Private Lanai, Patio, or Balcony
Activities room, Game Room, Theatre Room, Spiritual Room, Private Dining, Sunset Room
Low / No Sodium or Sugar

Find paradise at the Gateway to Waikiki! From your home at the gateway to one of the world’s most desirable destinations, you’ll be in close proximity to unmatched views, shopping, restaurant, and cultural offerings. Your home at The Plaza is more than a place to live – it’s a place to thrive, with convenient, all-inclusive month-to-month senior rentals that give you all the pleasures of home in a supportive and caring environment, the comfort and privacy of your own apartment, a thriving social world and a professional, caring team there for you 24 hours a day. Services and Amenities TRADE CHORES FOR RESORT-LIKE AMENITIES
  • Weekly housekeeping and linen services
  • Daily exercise classes
  • Three delicious meals a day served restaurant style
  • Scheduled transportation for shopping, errands, medical appointments, church
  • Concierge services
IN SOCIAL ACTIVITIES
  • Coffee bistro
  • On and off-site activities and excursions
  • Recreation and game rooms
  • Living rooms and outdoor sitting areas
  • Fitness and physical therapy center
  • Full-service salon
  • Media room/theater
  • Computer stations
  • Library and reading areas
  • Monthly wellness program
LIVE COMFORTABLY, SAFELY
  • Basic utilities
  • A variety of attractive apartment styles
  • Kitchenette with a refrigerator, freezer, microwave
  • Multiple nurse call systems in every apartment
  • Access to nursing team 24 hours a day
  • Personalized care plans
  • Walk-in shower with grab bars, adjustable bath bench and showerhead
  • Fire-rated doors, smoke alarms and sprinkler systems
  • Add-ons like laundry service, special diets and more are available
1812 Kalakaua Ave, Honolulu, Hawaii 96815 United States
Private Lanai, Patio, or Balcony

Find paradise at the Gateway to Waikiki! From your home at the gateway to one of the world’s most desirable destinations, you’ll be in close proximity to unmatched views, shopping, restaurant, and cultural offerings.

Kalakaua Gardens

1723 Kalakaua Avenue 

Honolulu, Hawaii  96826

We Embrace a Heart for Service and a Passion for Living.

OUR STORY KALAKAUA GARDENS is O'ahu’s Premier Senior Living Community. Just steps from the heart of Waikiki, Kalakaua Gardens offers a one-of-a-kind senior living experience. Carefully designed spaces for seniors who desire to embrace a vibrant and healthy lifestyle with countless opportunities for meaningful engagement. Our friendly, dedicated team members embrace a heart for service and a passion for living. We strive to always be kind, serve others with joy, inspire respect, live with honor, and continuously improve. We believe each individual is a living treasure of unequaled importance.
OUR COMMITMENT At KALAKAUA GARDENS we are committed to providing a safe, friendly and nurturing living environment where everyone is treated with kindness and respect. We pride ourselves on providing individualized services to our residents. Menus are filled with signature local dishes and made-from-scratch entrées. Programs and activities are tailored to resident preferences and interests. Health and wellness services are designed to encourage active lifestyles while supporting residents with varying levels of need.
Low / No Sodium or Sugar
